Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Cynthia May's Motion to Mediate in lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 1/28/2008 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. MINI MINUTES: Defendant Cynthia May's Motion to extend the arbitrator's jurisdiction is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted.
